meta.description: Modern real estate platform. Browse, list, and manage properties.

hero.title: Find Your Pulse in the
hero.subtitle: PropPulse connects you with the most exclusive properties in top locations. Buy, rent, or sell with confidence and speed.

values.title: Why Choose PropPulse?
values.description: We don't just sell houses; we help you find a place where your life happens. Our proprietary tech and expert agents make the process seamless.

about.title: We Are Proppulse
about.subtitle: Bridging the gap between modern technology and traditional real estate service. We believe buying a home should be as seamless as ordering a ride.
about.missionDescription: At PropPulse, we don't just sell properties; we engineer lifestyles. Our mission is to democratize access to premium real estate data while providing white-glove service to every client, regardless of budget.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question about a property or want to list your home? Our team is ready to help you 24/7.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Enter your email below to login to your account
signIn.quote: Proppulse helped me find not just a house, but a home where my family could grow. The process was seamless.
